_comment: Issue #64 plan v2 Δ2: a vendored file using any deferred directive is skipped loudly and wholesale, with a concrete activation issue per blocking directive. Homes (issue #86, M6-08d split the expect family): the still-deferred block-expect forms (expect ordered, expect range vector) and eval_warn/eval_info/@st start-timestamp lines -> #22. expect fail/expect string (issue #86) and expect warn|no_warn|info|no_info plus the {{...}} native-histogram sample-literal grammar (issue #124, M7-A6) are EXECUTABLE. load_with_nhcb (a distinct classic-bucket-to-NHCB load conversion, not the {{...}} literal grammar) stays deferred -> #22. The corpus test fails if a listed directive disappears from its file (activate the file!), if an unlisted deferred directive appears, or if a file is absent from both the executed set and this manifest. `manual_skip` (issue #124, M7-A6) is the non-directive lever: a file with ZERO deferred directives that still fails on replay for reasons outside any tracked directive — no drift check applies to it, unlike blocking_directives. No current users (issue #130 de-listed the last three).
